name: gemini_demo
description: Demo suite for the Gemini API: text generation with thinking, image generation, vision, TTS, audio transcription, embeddings, function calling, URL context, caching, and RAG.
install_notes: This plugin has a multi-file API (api/) and multi-page frontend (frontend/). It cannot be installed with plugin_install.py. Copy manually: api/ → backend/app/api/gemini/, frontend/ → frontend/app/dashboard/[guildId]/gemini-demo/, cog.py → bot/cogs/gemini_capabilities_demo.py. Register the router in backend/main.py and add a navigation card to frontend/app/page.tsx.
